mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY WHERE status = 'DISPLAY'
AND category = #{_parameter}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT c.post_id, c.user_id, c.title, c.content, c.category, c.view_count, c.like_count, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at, img.image_id AS rep_image_id, img.target_id AS rep_target_id, img.target_type AS rep_target_type, img.image_url AS rep_image_url, img.is_representative AS rep_is_representative, img.sort_order AS rep_sort_order, img.created_at AS rep_created_at FROM COMMUNITY c LEFT JOIN IMAGE_STORE img ON c.post_id = img.target_id AND img.target_type = 'COMMUNITY' AND img.is_representative = 'Y' WHERE c.status = 'DISPLAY' ORDER BY c.like_count DESC, c.view_count DESC, c.post_id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT c.post_id, c.user_id, c.title, c.content, c.category, c.view_count, c.like_count, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at, img.image_id AS rep_image_id, img.target_id AS rep_target_id, img.target_type AS rep_target_type, img.image_url AS rep_image_url, img.is_representative AS rep_is_representative, img.sort_order AS rep_sort_order, img.created_at AS rep_created_at FROM COMMUNITY c LEFT JOIN IMAGE_STORE img ON c.post_id = img.target_id AND img.target_type = 'COMMUNITY' AND img.is_representative = 'Y' WHERE c.post_id = #{post_id}

SELECT image_id, target_id, target_type, image_url, is_representative, sort_order, created_at AS imgUploadDate FROM IMAGE_STORE WHERE target_type = 'COMMUNITY' AND target_id = #{post_id} ORDER BY is_representative DESC, sort_order ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_POST.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO COMMUNITY ( post_id, user_id, title, content, category ) VALUES ( #{post_id}, #{user_id}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category} )

INSERT INTO IMAGE_STORE ( image_id, target_id, target_type, image_url, is_representative, sort_order, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_IMAGE.NEXTVAL, #{target_id}, #{target_type}, #{image_url}, #{is_representative}, #{sort_order}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMUNITY SET status = 'HIDDEN', updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{post_id}
UPDATE COMMUNITY SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = #{category}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{post_id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY WHERE status = 'DISPLAY'
AND category = #{category}
AND title LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND content LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND ( title LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR content LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' )
AND user_id LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMUNITY_LIKE ( like_id, user_id, post_id, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_COMMUNITY_LIKE.NEXTVAL, #{user_id}, #{post_id}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMUNITY SET like_count = CASE WHEN NVL(like_count, 0) > 0 THEN like_count - 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE post_id = #{post_id}
